---
title: "test_pathRegistry.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_pathRegistry.ts"
loc: 28
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.75
style_score: 7.04
intel_score: 8.54
overall_score: 8.11
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 7.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 1 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [beforeEach](file://node:test)
- [afterEach](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [*](file://path)
- [PathRegistry](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/pathRegistry.js)

### Exports
- `originalCwd`
- `deepDir`
- `registry`
- `root`
- `expectedRoot`
- `registry`
- `firstCall`
- `secondCall`
